pages.detail_2_3_Details:
Welcome, HONG (hy.swanforever@gmail.com) 
ALTA Sponsors
WHERE ATLANTA
COMES TO PLAY
Previous
Next
Register NOW for ALTA Summer Tennis

Don't miss out on some awesome summer tennis! We want to see MORE of you on the courts! Reinstate your previous roster OR create a NEW team! We love to see our leagues grow! Being a captain isn't hard! ALTA folks are ready to help you all season.

Roster registration runs through APRIL 15!!

**The season runs June 4 through July 18**

MIXED DOUBLES

Play is on Saturdays at 9:00 a.m. The league consists of five lines of doubles. You need six women and six men to form a team.

SENIOR WOMEN (45+)

Play is on Thursdays at 6:30 p.m. The league consists of four lines of doubles. You need 10 women to form a team.

SENIOR MEN (45+)

Play is on Fridays at 6:30 p.m. The league also consists of four lines of doubles. You need 10 men to form a team.

Connect with old friends or find some new ones this summer on the tennis court!

See link below to register!

CLICK HERE TO REGISTER 
Major Pickleball Expansion for the ALTA Summer Leagues

     Get ready to play even MORE pickleball this summer! ALTA is adding gender-specific summer day leagues to the calendar, so grab your paddles and grab your friends! In addition to a mixed doubles pickleball league, men’s and women’s leagues will be available for you to test your dinking skills so you don’t get “pickled.”

Summer Mixed Doubles

Different format than spring and fall seasons

Format: Two lines of men’s doubles and two lines of women’s doubles. Each line plays three games to 15, winning by two.

Day/Time: Mondays at 6:30 p.m.

Minimum number of players: 5 men and 5 women

Registration begins on April 30 and runs through May 17.

The season starts on June 15 and ends on July 27, followed by playoffs and City Finals.

Summer Men’s Doubles

Format: The format consists of three lines of men’s doubles. Each line plays three games to 15, winning by two.

Day/Time: Friday at 9:00 a.m.

Minimum number of players: 8 men

Registration begins on April 30 and runs through May 17.

The season starts on June 19 and ends on July 31, followed by playoffs and City Finals

Summer Women’s Doubles

Format: The format consists of three lines of women’s doubles. Each line plays three games to 15, winning by two.

Day/Time: Wednesdays at 9:00 a.m.

Minimum number of players: 8 women

Registration begins on April 30 and runs through May 17.

The season starts on June 17 and ends on July 29, followed by playoffs and City Finals.

Start forming your teams now, and make sure you have an ALTA-approved facility. We look forward to seeing you on the court!

 

 

 

FACILITY INSPECTION
Find a Team Today!

Ready to play some tennis, but you're not connected to a team? Check here for possible teams and/or list yourself as a player looking for a team. Use our new Google Maps under Facilities to see the locations of facilities near you.

Under Facilities, you may search by zip code to locate facilities near you. You can select "Teams" to see the teams that have played at a facility or are playing out of there for the current season. Some facilities have contact information for you to reach out to them directly.

FIND PLAYERS/TEAMS

ALTA Bulletin

The calendar offers a full listing of ALTA events and important deadlines, but some items are worthy of special note. Check the ALTA Bulletin often for timely news that affects members. Click on 'Go to Calendar' button from the above section for detailed event list.

CALLING ALL ALTA Volunteers!

Ever wonder how an organization with over 60,000 members became the leader in providing tennis and pickleball league play while supporting the advancement of racquet sports in underserved communities in Metro Atlanta? AND continues to thrive after 90 years with only six employees? It's because of our tremendously committed base of volunteers.

ALTA is now planning for 2026 and beyond. Please email us if you have interest in volunteer roles. We have a place for you if you have a background in finance, administrative work, data analysis, event planning, fundraising, league coordination, information technology, marketing, social media, and so much more. 

Please email eventsvp@altatennis.org for more information.

 

ALTA MERCHANDISE

ALTA City Finals merchandise is available to order online in addition to on site at all City Finals locations. Anything from shirts, pullovers, and tanks to hats, vests, towels and more. We have everything you need. 

There are some limited quantities, so don't delay.

Go to the ALTA Merchandise page to order apparel and other swag, in addition to fence signs and your team championship photos.

ORDER HERE
Get your NET NEWS online!

Did you misplace your copy of the latest (or a past issue) of ALTA's Net News? Do you want to share a story or City Finals photo with family in another town? Never fear! Current and past issues of ALTA's magazine are online! 

You can look up that recipe you wanted to try, read about the latest happenings in Atlanta area tennis and pickleball, and even learn about nutrition and fitness for the recreational player....all by clicking the button below.

 

Read the latest here!
